command:
N8N_KEY="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI0YjkyYzA5MS1kMTM3LTRiYmYtODIyMy03ODFhMjZjZGQwODEiLCJpc3MiOiJuOG4iLCJhdWQiOiJwdWJsaWMtYXBpIiwianRpIjoiMDAxZTM0OWYtNjYzMC00OTQyLTljOTQtZGEyZjk4YzlmOGYzIiwiaWF0IjoxNzgwNzk5OTExfQ.SRoqA9YJaMud-bhWB1KqGOzat9f8hXDlqe9aHxIMerE"
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup
git pull origin main

echo "=== STEP 1: STORE PRE-CHANGE BASELINE ==="
curl -s -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: "   http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P > /tmp/router-live.json
cp /tmp/router-live.json "baselines/development/router/chatgpt-homelab-agent-router-Phase8H-PreSentinelPrototype.json"
echo "Baseline:  bytes"

echo "=== STEP 2: COMMIT BASELINE ==="
git add baselines/development/router/
git commit -m "Phase 8H Pre-change development baseline stored"
git push origin main
git push github main

echo "=== STEP 3: MODIFY WORKFLOW ==="
echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/modify_router.py
python3 /tmp/modify_router.py

echo "=== STEP 4: PUSH TO N8N ==="
RESPONSE=
echo "" | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
nodes=[n.get('name') for n in d.get('nodes',[])]
print('Name:', d.get('name'))
print('Nodes:', len(nodes))
print('Node list:', nodes)
print('Active:', d.get('active'))
" 2>/dev/null || echo ""

echo "=== STEP 5: RE-ACTIVATE ==="
curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:5678/api/v1/workflows/pWnqKmUwimLYVZ5P/activate"   -H "X-N8N-API-KEY: " | python3 -c "
import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('Active:', d.get('active'))
" 2>/dev/null
